infoPlist.NSCalendarsUsageDescription: Add tasks you create from the calendar to Apple Calendar.
infoPlist.NSRemindersUsageDescription: Sync your daily tasks with Apple Reminders.
infoPlist.NSHealthShareUsageDescription: Read your steps, walking distance, activity, sleep, and weight to show progress on the Body and Today screens.
infoPlist.NSHealthUpdateUsageDescription: This app does not write health data; permission is only requested for compatibility with HealthKit.

plugins.calendarPermission: Add tasks you create from the calendar to Apple Calendar.
plugins.remindersPermission: Sync your daily tasks with Apple Reminders.

plugins.healthSharePermission: Read your steps, walking distance, activity, sleep, and weight to show progress on the Body and Today screens.
plugins.healthUpdatePermission: This app does not write health data to Apple Health.
